visual: Same bar graph (Dogs 65, Cats 40, Birds 25, Fish 30).
guide: "How about this one? How many more dogs are there than cats?"
prompt: How many more dogs are there than cats?
on_correct: "25 more dogs than cats. This one was just one step—no 'combined,' so straight to comparing."
on_incorrect_2: (B or C) "Dogs is 65, cats is 40. The difference is 65 minus 40."
design_note: Single-step problem mixed in to ensure students don't assume EVERY problem needs two steps. This prevents over-application of the new strategy.
